entry.title: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance Brazil: Download em massa de documentos fiscais eletrônicos
entry.content:
English version here / Versión en español aquí 

Olá pessoal,

O time de SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, opção de faturamento de saída para o Brasil lançou uma nova funcionalidade, o DF-e Mass Download.

Agora, você pode baixar muitos arquivos XML de documentos fiscais eletrônicos aprovados (NF-e, CT-e, NF3-e, MDF-e, e NFS-e), incluindo seus eventos, para fins de auditoria. Os arquivos de documentos fiscais eletrônicos são fornecidos em um arquivo compactado no formato tar.gz.

SAP Document and Reporting Compliance: DF-e Mass Download

 

A nova funcionalidade oferece os seguintes recursos:

  • A transação DF-e Mass Download (NFE_MASS_DOWNLOAD), ou o app DF-e Mass Download para usuários da nuvem, fornece vários parâmetros que permitem selecionar os documentos fiscais eletrônicos de acordo com suas necessidades.

  • Download de muitos arquivos XML de documentos aprovados de empresas específicas, locais de negócios ou números de CNPJ/CPF e diferentes documentos fiscais eletrônicos.

  • Melhor desempenho para baixar vários arquivos XML.

  • Visualização de um resumo dos documentos que serão baixados em um grupo específico, classificados por empresas, locais de negócios e parceiros, com base na seleção do filtro.

  • Atalho para a transação DF-e Mass Download (NFE_MASS_DOWNLOAD) no menu Ir Para da transação Monitor NF-e/CT-e (J1BNFE).

  • Integração do dashboard Usage Analytics com os arquivos baixados.

  • Transação Monitor NF-e/CT-e (J1BNFE) restrita a baixar menos de 500 documentos.

ⓘ Nota: O DF-e Mass Download suporta Nota Fiscal Eletrônica de Energia Elétrica (NF3-e) e Manifesto Eletrônico de Documentos Fiscais (MDF-e) por meio de APIs.


Implementação

Você pode implementar essas alterações seguindo as instruções nas SAP Notes:

  • SAP Note 3493359
  • SAP Note 3493360

Se você usa sistemas SAP S/4HANA ou SAP ERP:

  • Você pode controlar o acesso às funções de download em massa usando o objeto de autorização Business Place Authorization Object for DF-e Mass Download (NFE_MBUPLA). Para mais detalhes sobre esse objeto, consulte a documentação do objeto de autorização disponível no sistema por meio da transação Atualizar Objetos de Autorização (SU21).

  • Você deve agendar o job NF-e Mass Download Job Orchestrator (NFE_MASSD_JOB_REPORT) para ser executado de acordo com suas necessidades comerciais.

Para obter mais informações sobre o DF-e Mass Download, consulte a seguinte página do portal SAP Help:

Outbound Invoices > Mass Download

Integração com o Usage Analytics

No dashboard do Usage Analytics, você encontra os arquivos baixados em massa em Outbound Metric Name. Nessa métrica, cada grupo totaliza 15 mil documentos. E cada grupo de documentos é considerado 1 documento processado nessa métrica. Consulte os seguintes cenários como exemplos:

  • Se você baixar 10 mil documentos, será cobrado por um grupo de 15 mil documentos. Ou seja, 1 documento na métrica de licenciamento.

  • Se você baixar 25 mil documentos, será cobrado por um grupo de 15 mil documentos para os primeiros 15 mil documentos e outro grupo para os 10 mil documentos restantes. Ou seja, 2 documentos na métrica de licenciamento.

  • Se você baixar 50 mil documentos, será cobrado por quatro grupos de 15 mil documentos cada. Ou seja, 4 documentos na métrica de licenciamento.

O Usage Analytics pode ser usado para os seguintes documentos fiscais eletrônicos: NF-e, CT-e, NF3-e, MDF-e, e NFS-e. Para mais detalhes sobre o dashboard do Usage Analytics e SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, opção de emissão de faturamento de saída para o Brasil, você pode conferir o blog post que explica como usar essa ferramenta.

Blog posts relacionados

  • Como navegar facilmente nas páginas do SAP Help Portal para Outbound Nota Fiscal
  • Como navegar facilmente nas páginas do SAP Help Portal para Inbound Nota Fiscal
  • An Introduction to SAP Document and Reporting Compliance: Navigating the SAP Help Portal

Você pode receber alerta por email quando novas SAP Notes forem lançadas ou atualizadas nos componentes listados abaixo; basta seguir as instruções do SAP Knowledge Base Article 2478289.

  • FI-LOC-NFE-BR-OUT
  • LOD-LH-NFE

Acesse o gerenciador de modificações legais para ter uma noção do que está planejado para ser suportado. Consulte o SAP Knowledge Base Article 3421995 e a página Regulatory Change Manager para entender como usar esta ferramenta.

Gostou desse post? Dê um “like” (kudos) e compartilhe o conteúdo com seus colegas. Sinta-se à vontade para deixar suas perguntas no SAP Community e ler posts semelhantes no blogging space do SAP Document and Reporting Compliance.

Para acompanhar as últimas notícias da NF-e, siga a tag SAP Electronic Invoicing for Brazil (SAP Nota Fiscal Eletronica) e a comunidade SAP Document and Reporting Compliance.

Obrigado e até a próxima,
Thiago

entry.title: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance Brazil: Descarga masiva de documentos fiscales electrónicos
entry.content:
English version here / Versão em português aqui

 ¡Hola a todos!

El equipo de SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, outbound invoicing option for Brazil ha lanzado una nueva funcionalidad, el DF-e Mass Download.

Ahora, puede descargar una gran cantidad archivos XML de documentos fiscales electrónicos aprobados (NF-e, CT-e, NF3-e, MDF-e, y NFS-e), incluidos sus eventos, para fines de auditoría. Los archivos de documentos fiscales electrónicos se proporcionan en un archivo comprimido en formato tar.gz.

SAP Document and Reporting Compliance: DF-e Mass Download

 

La nueva funcionalidad ofrece los siguientes recursos:

  • La transacción DF-e Mass Download (NFE_MASS_DOWNLOAD), o la app DF-e Mass Download para usuarios de cloud, proporciona varios parámetros que le permiten seleccionar los documentos fiscales electrónicos según sus necesidades.

  • Descarga de muchos archivos XML de documentos aprobados de sociedades, lugares de negocio, números de CNPJ/CPF, y diferentes documentos fiscales electrónicos.

  • Mejor desempeño para descargar una gran cantidad de archivos XML.

  • Vista previa de un resumen de los documentos que se descargarán en un grupo específico, clasificados por sociedades, lugares de negocio e interlocutores comerciales (partners), según la selección de filtros.

  • El acceso directo para la transacción de DF-e Mass Download (NFE_MASS_DOWNLOAD) en el menú Ir a de la transacción de NF-e/CT-e Monitor (J1BNFE).

  • Integración del dashboard Usage Analytics con los archivos descargados.

  • Transacción de NF-e/CT-e Monitor (J1BNFE) restringida a la descarga de menos de 500 documentos.

ⓘ Nota: El DF-e Mass Download soporta la Factura Electrónica de Energía Eléctrica (NF3-e) y el Manifiesto Electrónico de Documentos Fiscales (MDF-e) a través de APIs.

Implementación

Puede implementar estos cambios siguiendo las instrucciones de las SAP Notes:

  • SAP Note 3493359
  • SAP Note 3493360

Si utiliza los sistemas SAP S/4HANA o SAP ERP:

  • Puede controlar el acceso a las funciones de descarga masiva mediante el objeto de autorización Business Place Authorization Object for DF-e Mass Download (NFE_MBUPLA). Para obtener más detalles sobre este objeto, consulte la documentación del objeto de autorización disponible dentro del sistema a través de la transacción Actualización de Objeto de Autorización (SU21).

  • Debe agendar el NF-e Mass Download Job Orchestrator (NFE_MASSD_JOB_REPORT) para que se ejecute de acuerdo con las necesidades de tu negocio.

Para obtener más información sobre el DF-e Mass Download, consulte la siguiente página del portal SAP Help:

Outbound Invoices > Mass Download

Integración con Usage Analytics

En el dashboard de Usage Analytics, encontrará los archivos descargados en masa en Outbound Metric Name. En esta métrica, cada grupo suma 15 mil documentos. Y cada grupo de documentos se considera 1 documento procesado en la métrica. Consulte los siguientes escenarios como ejemplos:

  • Si descarga 10 mil documentos, se le cobrará por un grupo de 15 mil documentos. En otras palabras, 1 documento en la métrica de licencias.

  • Si descarga 25 mil documentos, se le cobrará por un grupo de 15 mil documentos por los primeros 15 mil documentos y por otro grupo por los 10 mil documentos restantes. Es decir, 2 documentos en la métrica de licencias.

  • Si descarga 50 mil documentos, se le cobrará por cuatro grupos de 15 mil documentos cada uno. Es decir, 4 documentos en la métrica de licencias.

Usage Analytics se puede utilizar para los siguientes documentos fiscales electrónicos: NF-e, CT-e, NF3-e, MDF-e, y NFS-e. Para obtener más detalles sobre el dashboard de Usage Analytics y SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, outbound invoicing option for Brazil, puede consultar la publicación que explica cómo usar esta herramienta.

Publicaciones relacionadas

  • How to Easily Browse the SAP Help Portal Pages for Outbound Nota Fiscal
  • How to Easily Browse the SAP Help Portal Pages for Inbound Nota Fiscal
  • An Introduction to SAP Document and Reporting Compliance: Navigating the SAP Help Portal

Puede registrarse para recibir alertas por correo electrónico cuando se publiquen o actualicen nuevas SAP Notes en los componentes que se enumeran a continuación; solo siga las instrucciones del SAP Knowledge Base Article 2478289.

  • FI-LOC-NFE-BR-OUT
  • LOD-LH-NFE

Use la herramienta regulatory change manager para averiguar si se planea una solución para un cambio legal. Siga las instrucciones del SAP Knowledge Base Article 3421995 y a la página regulatory change manager para usar esta herramienta.

¿Te ha parecido útil este blog? Si es así, haga clic en “like” (kudos), compártelo con tus colegas y sígueme para ver contenido similar. No dude en dejar sus preguntas en la comunidad SAP Document and Reporting Compliance. Y lea publicaciones de blog similares en blogging space SAP Document and Reporting Compliance.

No olvide seguir la tag SAP Electronic Invoicing for Brazil (SAP Nota Fiscal Eletronica) y la comunidad SAP Document and Reporting Compliance para tener conocimiento de las últimas noticias de NF-e.

Gracias y saludos,
Thiago

entry.title: Electronic Invoices for Malaysia: A Guide for Communication Settings
entry.content:
You are in the process of implementing electronic invoices for Malaysia. One of the key implementation activities is to integrate your business system (for example, SAP S/4HANA Cloud) with SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, cloud edition. The cloud edition acts as a bridge between your business system and the Inland Revenue Board of Malaysia (IRBM), the tax authorities in Malaysia. Among other settings, you must configure communication settings in the Manage Communication Settings - External Parties app in the cloud edition to connect to the IRBM. This blog guides you through configuring these communication settings.

Getting Started

Start your journey by reading the following documentation, which describes how to configure communication settings:

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud: Managing Communication Settings | SAP Help Portal 
  • SAP S/4HANA: Managing Communication Settings | SAP Help Portal
  • SAP ERP: Managing Communication Settings | SAP Help Portal

The communication settings primarily involve maintaining the credentials that you've obtained from the IRBM or another authority, including a pair of client ID and client secret as well as a digital certificate. You should get these credentials ready for use before proceeding to configure communication settings in the cloud edition. You can find out the Malaysia-specific settings from the Process-Specific Settings page:

Product Guide: Process Specific Settings

Step 1: Create a New Communication Type

You need to first retrieve your taxpayer identification number (TIN) as described at How to retrieve and verify company TIN number? and then create a new communication type using this TIN.

Create communication type


Step 2: Add an Authentication Setting for Consuming the IRBM APIs

For the communication type created in step 1, add an authentication setting that is used to consume the IRBM APIs, as follows:

  1. Select the Basic type.
  2. Enter your client ID as the username and your client secret as the password.
    See How to obtain Client ID and Client Secret?.

Add basic authentication type

Step 3: Add an Authentication Setting for Signing Electronic Invoices

For the communication type created in step 1, add another authentication setting that is used to sign electronic invoices, as follows:

  1. Select the Key Pair X.509 type.
  2. Upload the certificate you generated from one of the certified service providers.
  3. Enter the password for your digital certificate.
    You need to purchase a digital certificate from a certificate authority (CA) in Malaysia. See How to acquire Digital Signature?.

Note: SAP supports soft certificates only, roaming certificates are not supported. The digital certificate extensions supported are PFX and P12.

Add Keypair

More Information

Suppose that your company has several company codes representing headquarters and subsidiary units. In this case, you can choose to use only one digital certificate, which is registered with the TIN of headquarters or a leading subsidiary. The TIN associated with the common certificate is referred to as intermediary or intermediary representative. See For companies that have subsidiaries, does digital certificate need to be registered for each subsidiary?.

If you use different SAP systems at the same time, such as SAP ERP and SAP S/4HANA, you can still use the same digital certificate.

Also remember that a digital certificate has an expiration date. You must renew your certificate when it's expiring soon. See Do I need to renew a digital certificate?. Otherwise, you'll encounter the following errors:

  • Certificate is not valid according to the chain of trust validation or has been issued by an untrusted certificate authority.
  • Signing time is not within validity period.

We hope that you find this information useful. Feel free to leave a comment on this blog or follow SAP Document and Reporting Compliance | SAP Community.

SAP Document and Reporting Compliance

entry.title: GRC Tuesdays: Get Ready for SAP for Global Trade and Tax 2024
entry.content:
Now that the Paris 2024 Olympic & Paralympics Games are over, it’s time to plan ahead for the next greatest event of the year!

Yes, you guessed it right: SAP for Global Trade and Tax Conference – Presented by TAC Insights is back.

This year, we’ll be once again in Amsterdam from the 7th to the 8th of November for 2 exciting days filled with real life business cases, transformation stories, implementation tips, lessons learned, and expert insights from presenters from companies across the planet.

This event is designed to bring the SAP Global Trade and Tax community together to hear how your peers are using SAP solutions to streamline compliance, respond to upcoming e-invoicing and reporting regulations, automate cross-border operations and global trade functions.

 

Preconference workshops

 

Before we start the conference itself, there are also optional half-day workshops (preregistration is required) distributed along 2 tracks – much like the rest of the conference:

 

Tax workshop

 

Trade workshop

 

Part 1 - Setup e-invoices with SAP Document and Reporting Compliance for SAP and non-SAP systems

Part 2 - Extensibility at your fingertip: efficiently route supplier invoices and define your own consistency checks between SAP S/4HANA and authorities

Part 1 - Going from SAP GTS 11.0 to SAP GTS edition for SAP HANA – pros and cons of transition scenarios and conversion paths

Part 2 – Leverage SAP Business Technology Platform based services to extend you international trade footprint

 

Customer stories

 

Most of the conference will of course revolve around customer stories. Here, you can gain tangible examples of successful real-world scenarios from experienced customers, with numerous tax and trade topics covered including:

Tax business cases

  

 

 

o   SAP Document and Reporting Compliance success story

o   Journey in SAP S/4HANA with SAP Document and Reporting Compliance

o   Using the latest SAP BTP technology for VAT determination

o   Key Insights from Implementing SAP Document and Reporting Compliance

o   … and more!

o   Demystifying SAP Global Trade Services

o   Landscape simplification by co-deploying SAP Global Trade Services, edition for HANA with SAP S/4HANA 2023

o   Migrating SAP Systems to new EU customs process: overcoming the hurdles

o   … with more to come as we are still confirming some of the sessions!

Trade testimonials

 

 

 

Masterclasses

 

Masterclasses are a new concept for the Global Trade and Tax Conference but has already been trialled successfully by TAC Insights – the conference organizer and the driving force behind these events. So we’re happy to be able to offer them in Amsterdam as well.

Designed for attendees seeking a deeper understanding of specific SAP solutions, Masterclasses are interactive sessions where you will have the opportunity to hear detailed insights directly from experts, and ask any questions you may have.

Three Masterclasses are currently planned:

  • Revolutionize Your Tax Compliance with Avalara's Tax Engine Solution, presented by Avalara
  • The Value of Implementing a Tax Engine, presented by Vertex
  • KPMG will also be presenting on trade, and the session description will be added to this blog as soon it is confirmed

 

SAP keynote and roadmap sessions

 

I guess this is not a surprise, but, from SAP, we’d also welcome this opportunity to share some of our insights. Including the latest SAP trade and tax tools and innovation presented directly from Product Management colleagues in our opening keynote but also in the “What’s coming?” sessions.

 

… And networking opportunities!

 

After all, if we meet face-to-face, it’s also to be able to create connexions! So attendees will be able to unwind and get to catch up with the cross-industry community during the coffee and lunch breaks of course, but also at the drinks reception after the first day.

 

 

 

 

 

Interested in learning more about this unmissable event?

 

If you are looking for more details, then head straight to one of the links below where you’ll find much more information than the summary shared in this short blog:

  • Event home page
  • Detailed agenda
  • Book your ticket

This annual gathering is a unique opportunity for our international global trade and tax community to come together, share best practices, tackle sector challenges, re-connect and most importantly have fun. So I look forward to meeting you there!

And if you are interested in learning more about SAP solutions for Governance, Risk, and Compliance ahead of time, feel free to fill-in the demo request form!

entry.title: SAP ERP公有云2408大中国区本地化亮点一览
entry.content:
随着智能化的浪潮在全球进一步推高经济发展，富有远见的企业，借此东风，在数字化升级上全面铺开，因此更需要聚焦增长核心，选择合适的技术，并优先解决管理与增长方面的关键挑战。

      SAP全球化部门提供面向中国大陆和台湾地区的 SAP ERP 云本地化解决方案，为中国大陆和台湾地区本土企业及进入大中国区的跨国企业的运营合规保驾护航，并带来真正的业务价值。

      最新发布的SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408 大中国区本地化新功能，提供了一些关键改进和新增功能，进一步增强SAP ERP公有云面对大中国区本地市场的适用性， 持续提升本地用户体验，并优化业务流程。

      下面，让我们深入了解一下这次更新中的主要亮点。 

中国本地化报表更新

中国现金流量表(基于SAP DRC)功能更新

      自SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408起，用户将可以根据GR/IR清算关系确定现金流条目。在完成相关必要配置（如现金流量表报表版本中勾选“使用收货科目”标记、设定GR/IR科目等 ）后，将实现根据设置的GR/IR关系来匹配现金流条目；相应的会计凭证、采购订单对应的物料凭证都可以在系统中追溯。通过结合采购场景相关凭证的清算链，进一步提高现金流量表的数据准确性。

示例如下：

中国总账科目余额报表功能更新

      自SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408起，Fiori “显示总账科目余额”的汇总/日记账分录视图下，当满足一定条件时，可为用户提供凭证货币的期初余额、总计（按天）、本期金额、本年累计等重要业务数据；同时，在摘要视图下，也可以提供将汇总行导出至PDF和Excel的功能。

中国增值税发票管理(基于SAP DRC)功能更新

      从SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408起，进项发票管理和销项发票管理在功能层面进一步增强。

      在进项发票管理中，用户可以自定义发票同步频率，通过直连接口，实现发票相关的数据和文件到S/4HANA系统的自动同步；优化了月末发票勾选的发票筛选条件；提供了把发票列表发送给税局端纳税申报的直连方式；方案的可扩展性也进一步扩展。

      在销项发票管理中，基于用户反馈，为红字发票新增了原因代码；并更新中国数电发票的上载模板，确保了税务合规。

      更多中国增值税发票方案的详情介绍，请点击阅读 链接。

 

中国本地化资金更新

收付款管理通信功能更新

      自SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408起，为更好地协助客户规划日常业务执行、减轻重复工作量，Fiori “计划银行通信作业– 中国”为用户提供定期发送付款文件、定期请求银行回单的作业，定期查询付款项目状态的计划作业。这一系列功能的提供，将大幅提高企业与银行日常业务交互的效率。

 

收付款管理银行回单功能更新

      自SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408起，Fiori “处理银行回单 – 中国”提供了批量处理功能（批量处理回单、批量回单合并过账），以及更为透明的回单修改日志功能，从而进一步提升财务用户的作业效率。

 

 

收付款管理审批功能更新

      自SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408起，Fiori “管理付款项目审批的工作流”中新增多种付款审批条件，使得付款审批场景更为丰富和弹性。

 

收付款管理付款申请功能更新

      自SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408起，Fiori “管理付款申请”进一步提供增强功能，包括支持申请作废及其审批的相关操作以及同一银行下支持多个账户选择等多样化处理。

 

中国固定资产管理功能更新

      自SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408起，用户可以通过相关配置点，激活中国固定资产报废功能；配置完成后，可以实现中国会计准则要求的“在固定资产报废后，先将固定资产余额结转到资产处置科目“的法规要求。

台湾电子发票资料交换标准讯息建置指引MIG4.0版

      台湾电子发票资料交换标准讯息建置指引(MIG) 4.0版于2024年1月1日开始启用；MIG 3.2.1版及3.1.2版将于2026年1月1日停止使用，同时全面使用MIG 4.0版。

      针对这一法规变更，SAP台湾电子发票本地化方案进行了相应的功能更新，主要包括：电子发票存证模式B2B和B2C的XML格式统一以及XML映射调整，电子发票交互模式XML映射调整，以及与MIG4.0版激活相关的配置。

      更多台湾电子发票MIG4.0版相关功能的详情介绍，请点击阅读 链接。

      世界经济局势瞬息万变，各类政策法规的变更演进层出不穷。无论企业目前计划深耕大中国区经营发展，或走向更广阔的全球市场，SAP全球化部门都为您在云时代的合规运营及本地化管理，赋能未来。

       关于S/4HANA 2408大中国区本地化功能的更多详情，欢迎请参考链接
